Mastermind Live Teaching with Bas Wouters | session 4
Deep-dive on Liking
Discover the principle of liking and its significant role in persuasion, learning how to establish strong relationships and connections
swiftly and effectively. You'll explore various strategies, such as finding genuine similarities and giving compliments, to enhance
your persuasive abilities. The session also addresses the psychological aspects of liking, including the impact of physical
attractiveness and the halo effect, providing insights on how to ethically and effectively apply these principles in personal and
professional scenarios.
Mastermind Teaching
www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 1 --
